behavior: Gate 0 approval is recorded, stale release, debt, testing, and release-pipeline claims are reconciled, and deterministic plan-integrity checks prevent v3 inventory drift before contract work begins.
revision_scope: The clean committed Milestone 0 implementation before the evidence-only state transition.

commands.relevant_result: The active-plan routes, 230 canonical idea dispositions, release-truth markers, state, architecture, workflow policy, and file-size coverage passed.
commands.caveat: Repository GitHub Actions remains temporarily disabled by user direction.

commands.relevant_result: Markdown, maintained links, and prose passed across 157 files.
commands.caveat: The release-pipeline decision is recorded for Milestone 11; disabled workflows cannot provide hosted rehearsal evidence now.

commands.relevant_result: Every direct dependency has a current YAGNI rationale after direct scopeguard ownership was removed.
commands.caveat: scopeguard remains transitive through lock_api; this change removes direct ownership rather than the transitive package.

commands.relevant_result: All six maintained production and test scopes reported zero exact duplicate lines and regions.
commands.caveat: The sensor detects exact runs of 14 significant lines, not semantic duplication.

commands.relevant_result: Every governed source and configuration file remained within hard limits with zero changed review-threshold files.
All 837 script and harness tests passed, including focused v3 disposition and release-marker cases.
commands.caveat: The host Node 26.5.0 and npm 11.17.0 differ from the repository pins; this is focused milestone evidence, not release evidence.

commands.relevant_result: The clean committed Milestone 0 implementation had no whitespace errors.
commands.caveat: The evidence and state transition are a following documentation-only commit.

decisions.dependency_review: Use existing tempfile ownership for OCR cleanup; retain hex, urlencoding, and basic-toml with evidence-backed rationales.
decisions.testing_backlog: Remove implemented or generic future-work claims; retain only measured performance and risk-based mutation work in the master plan.
decisions.release_pipeline: Make authenticated draft verification blocking before publication at Milestone 11, restore platform scoping, and keep unauthenticated public-download verification as a post-publication closure check.
decisions.a20: Remain deferred unless Gate 1 evidence proves existing application and Tokio typed-job owners insufficient.
